summary: Target-facing scout evidence for the Python v0.18.6..v0.19.0 auto-port. This fixture pins Python v0.18.6 and Rust 0.3.5 as previous baselines, Python v0.19.0 and Rust 0.4.0 as targets, and requires source references, changed-path mappings, execution capability contracts/config, compiled grants, approval and gate behavior, runner support/evidence metadata, inspection surfaces, release checks, and explicit millrace-web package/version unsupported-gap evidence.

compiler_grant_contract.strict_failure: required advisory grants fail when fail_required_advisory is enabled or requires_enforcement is true

runner_support_contract.pi_rpc_support_note: conservative advisory support where narrow enforcement cannot be proven

non_live_guarantees: no live Python execution beyond checked-out ../millrace-py diff inspection
